name: python_with_statement_addition
description: Test detection of with statement context manager addition
old_code:
def read_file(filename):
    file = open(filename)
    content = file.read()
    file.close()
    return content
new_code:
def read_file(filename):
    with open(filename) as file:
        content = file.read()
    return content

expected_changes.description: With statement context manager added for file handling
File assignment and close statements removed
